ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., CSV, API, web scraping) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "size_in_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_truth" (
  "ground_truth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground-truth data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the ground-truth data belongs to */,
  "ground_truth_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground-truth data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ground-truth data */,
  "ground_truth_type" TEXT /* Type of ground-truth data (e.g., text, image, audio) */,
  "ground_truth_format" TEXT /* Format of the ground-truth data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_truth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ground_truth_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the evaluation metric belongs to */,
  "ground_truth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground-truth data the evaluation metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., precision, recall, F1-score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the evaluation metric (e.g., percentage, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_ground_truth_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_truth_id") REFERENCES ground_truth ("ground_truth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view datasets, edit datasets) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metric_values" (
  "evaluation_metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the evaluation metric value belongs to */,
  "ground_truth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground-truth data the evaluation metric value belongs to */,
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric the value belongs to */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "metric_value_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metric_values_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metric_values_ground_truth_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_truth_id") REFERENCES ground_truth ("ground_truth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metric_values_evaluation_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("evaluation_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "evaluation_metric_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric value the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization (e.g., image, chart data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_evaluation_metric_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_metric_value_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metric_values ("evaluation_metric_value_id")
)
